mapper.select: SELECT mr.*, cr.relic_name AS relicName, su.real_name AS maintainerName FROM maintenance_record mr LEFT JOIN cultural_relic cr ON mr.relic_id = cr.id LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON mr.maintainer_id = su.id WHERE mr.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO maintenance_record (relic_id, maintenance_type, maintenance_date, maintenance_content, maintainer, maintainer_id, status, remark, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{relicId}, #{maintenanceType}, #{maintenanceDate}, #{maintenanceContent}, #{maintainerName}, #{maintainerId}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
